description: Initial source weights for canonical blend. Founder-adjustable. See weight_rationale below.

weight_rationale.tier_1_primary: KTC (1.2) and FantasyCalc (1.0) are the highest-signal crowdsourced market sources with the largest player pools and most consistent data.
weight_rationale.tier_2_expert: DLF sources (1.0) are expert-curated rank-based signals. Reliable but smaller coverage.
weight_rationale.tier_3_secondary_market: DynastyDaddy (0.8) is a secondary market/API source with good coverage but slightly less market adoption.
weight_rationale.tier_4_supplemental: Yahoo (0.7), FantasyPros (0.7), DraftSharks (0.7), DynastyNerds (0.6), Flock (0.6) are supplemental sources with variable reliability or fragile upstream scraping.
weight_rationale.tier_idp: IDPTradeCalc (1.0) is the primary non-DLF IDP source. PFF IDP (0.7), DraftSharks IDP (0.6), FantasyPros IDP (0.6) are supplemental IDP.

how_to_tune: Edit the 'sources' values below. Higher = more influence. Set to 0 to exclude. Re-run: python scripts/source_pull.py && python scripts/canonical_build.py && python scripts/run_comparison_batch.py
